title: Pseudonoseris szyszylowiczii
taxonomy: Pseudonoseris szyszylowiczii is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the Andes mountain range in South America. The classification of this plant places it within the tribe Liabeae, which consists of plants typically found in the tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas.
